channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Nikola Jokic says the surging New York Knicks are a 'top-5 candidate' to win the NBA title
item.description: Two years after he won an NBA title, Nikola Jokic views the surging New York Knicks as a “top-five candidate” to end their 52-year championship drought.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rice Owls baseball to open season in Puerto Rico
item.description: Rice Owls head coach Jose Cruz, Jr. has used his connections in Puerto Rico to recruit and change the dynamic of the Owls all three seasons he’s been the head coach. Now, Cruz, Jr. and the Owls will travel to the Commonwealth not just for recruiting purposes, but for games.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State quality control coach placed on leave amid university investigation
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Ohio State defensive quality control coach Joe Lyberger has been on paid administrative leave for the last month while the university investigates him. Ohio State's human resources department sent Lyberger a letter on Dec. 27 that noted he would be placed on leave immediately.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season. The franchise will use a final round of fan voting to decide among the Utah Mammoth, Utah Hockey Club and Utah Wasatch.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Courtney Vandersloot to sign with Chicago Sky, returning to franchise that drafted her
item.description: Free agent guard Courtney Vandersloot is headed back to Chicago, her agent confirmed to The Associated Press on Wednesday. The veteran guard will sign with the team that drafted her in 2011 after spending the last two seasons in New York, agent Lindsay Kagawa Colas said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Super Bowl advertisers shell out record prices
item.description: Get ready for an onslaught of ads full of celebrities, cute animals and snack brands during breaks in the action at Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man City rallies to beat Club Brugge and advance in Champions League. PSG also wins and stays in
item.description: Manchester City flirted with a disastrous exit from the Champions League before rallying to beat Club Brugge 3-1 in a must-win game.
item.dc:creator: Graham Dunbar, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Madsen leads Utes past Cincinnati, 69-66
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored seven of his 18 points in the final two minutes, Keanu Dawes added 12 points and nine rebounds and Utah beat Cincinnati 69-66 on Tuesday night. Ezra Ausar scored 11 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: RSL players Diego Luna and Emeka Eneli shine for US Men's National Team
item.description: After subbing into the match against Venezuela on Saturday night to help the U.S. Men’s National Team secure a 3-1 victory, Real Salt Lake stars Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna earned starts on Wednesday night in a commanding 3-0 victory over Costa Rica.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
